creator: webmaster@andreas-diem.at
text:
I use make or portmaster to install the ports.

Today I upgrade 6 ports.

##
clamav-0.99                        <   needs updating (index has 0.99_1)
dcc-dccd-1.3.158                   <   needs updating (index has 1.3.158_1)
pkg-1.6.4                          <   needs updating (index has 1.6.4_1)
postfix-2.11.7_1,1                 <   needs updating (index has 2.11.7_2,1)
py27-dateutil-2.3                  <   needs updating (index has 2.4.2)
py27-pytest-2.8.5                  <   needs updating (index has 2.8.7)
##

The ports py27-dateutil and py27-pytes had this problems.

--Andy
